summary: Statistics page UI improvements tested - All features PASSED. 1) League chips (Serie A, Premier League, La Liga, Bundesliga, Ligue 1) display full text without truncation due to flexShrink: 0. 2) Round picker dropdown button with calendar icon appears on Results and Upcoming tabs. 3) Round picker modal opens from bottom showing 'Seleziona Giornata' title with 'Tutte le giornate' and individual round options. 4) Selecting a round filters fixtures to that matchday. 5) Standings tab correctly does NOT show round picker.

league_chips_flexShrink.details: All 5 league chips (Serie A, Premier League, La Liga, Bundesliga, Ligue 1) display full text without truncation on horizontal scroll

results_tab_round_picker.details: Round picker button with calendar icon displays 'Giornata 26' on Results tab. Clicking opens modal with 'Seleziona Giornata' title

upcoming_tab_round_picker.details: Round picker button with calendar icon displays 'Giornata 27' on Upcoming tab. Modal opens correctly with round options

standings_no_round_picker.details: Standings tab correctly does NOT show round picker - only Results and Upcoming tabs have it

round_selection_filtering.details: Selecting a specific round filters fixtures to show only that matchday's matches

tutte_le_giornate_option.details: 'Tutte le giornate' option shows all fixtures without filtering when selected

modal_animation.details: Round picker modal opens from bottom with slide animation, closes on overlay tap

selected_round_checkmark.details: Currently selected round shows checkmark in modal and button text updates accordingly

backend_api_round_info.details: GET /api/stats/results/135?season=2025&last=30 returns fixtures with round field (e.g., 'Regular Season - 26')

critical_code_review_comments: Code uses data-testid instead of React Native's testID - while functional, should use testID for consistency with RN conventions
flexShrink: 0 correctly applied to both leagueChip and leagueChipText styles at lines 473 and 484
FixturesWithRoundPicker component auto-selects first round on data load via useEffect at line 324
Modal uses Modal component with transparent background and slide animation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Statistics page round picker feature fully working. The picker button shows selected round (e.g., 'Giornata 26') with calendar icon. Modal opens from bottom with list of available rounds. Results tab has rounds like 24-26, Upcoming tab has rounds like 27-29. League chips use flexShrink: 0 to prevent text truncation on horizontal scroll.
